title: Amtech G0948 Filler Knife Set, 3 Piece Scraper Kit, 38mm, 75mm, 150mm, Paint Remover
features: 3 SIZES: This filler knife set includes sizes: 38mm, 75mm and 150mm
DURABLE: Made from tough, lightweight plastic, they are easy to clean for re-use
SIZE CAPACITY: 38 mm / 75 mm / 150 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: From the manufacturer 3pc filler knife set Manufactured from durable plastic Easy to clean for re-use Lightweight construction Set includes 38, 75 & 150mm About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
